name: Affenpinscher
temperament: Loyal and loving companion; watchful of strangers and fearless toward aggressors.

name: Afghan Hound
temperament: Dignified and aloof, with a certain keen fierceness.

name: Airedale Terrier
temperament: Outgoing and confident, friendly, courageous and intelligent. Alert at all times, not aggressive but fearless.

name: Akita
temperament: Dignified, courageous, aloof; tends to show dominance over other dogs, though the trait is not encouraged.

name: Alaskan Malamute
temperament: Affectionate, friendly, loyal, devoted companion but not a ‘one man’ dog, playful on invitation, generally impressive by his dignity after maturity but tends to show dominance to other dogs.

name: Anatolian Shepherd Dog
temperament: Steady and bold without aggression, naturally independent, very intelligent. Proud and confident.

name: Australian Cattle Dog
temperament: Alert, intelligent, watchful, courageous, trustworthy, devoted to its work.

name: Australian Shepherd
temperament: Even disposition. May show initial reserve, never shy or aggressive.

name: Australian Silky Terrier
temperament: Very friendly, quick and responsive.

name: Australian Terrier
temperament: Friendly, extrovert, obedient and anxious to please. Lives happily in town or country. Not aggressive but courageous if attacked.

name: Azawakh (Imp)
temperament: Attentive, distant, reserved with strangers. Neither nervous nor aggressive. Affectionate and gentle with his family. This breed needs gentle and sensitive handling during the judging procedure.

name: Barbet (Imp)
temperament: Responsive, loving, loyal and sociable, with even disposition.

name: Basenji
temperament: An intelligent, independent, but affectionate and alert breed. Can be aloof with strangers.

name: Basset Bleu De Gascogne (Imp)
temperament: Audacious, curious and affectionate but somewhat reserved.

name: Basset Fauve De Bretagne
temperament: Lively, friendly and amenable.

name: Basset Griffon Vendeen (Grand)
temperament: Happy and outgoing. Independent and a little stubborn, not easily agitated, yet willing to please with firm handling.

name: Basset Griffon Vendeen (Petit)
temperament: Happy, extrovert, independent, yet willing to please.

name: Basset Hound
temperament: Placid, never aggressive or timid. Affectionate.

name: Bavarian Mountain Hound
temperament: Calm, biddable, devoted to owner, self-assured but reserved with strangers. Never shy or aggressive.

name: Beagle
temperament: Amiable and alert, showing no aggression or timidity.

name: Bearded Collie
temperament: Steady, intelligent working dog, with no signs of nervousness or aggression.

name: Beauceron
temperament: Bold, fearless, intelligent.

name: Bedlington Terrier
temperament: Good tempered, having an affectionate nature, dignified, not shy or nervous. Mild in repose but full of courage when roused.

name: Belgian Shepherd Dog (Groenendael)
temperament: Intelligent, alert and naturally vigilant. Devoted to his owners, may show some initial reserve, but not nervous or aggressive.

name: Belgian Shepherd Dog (Laekenois)
temperament: Intelligent, alert and naturally vigilant. Devoted to his owners, may show some initial reserve, but not nervous or aggressive.

name: Belgian Shepherd Dog (Malinois)
temperament: Intelligent, alert and naturally vigilant. Devoted to his owners, may show some initial reserve, but not nervous or aggressive.

name: Belgian Shepherd Dog (Tervueren)
temperament: Intelligent, alert and naturally vigilant. Devoted to his owners, may show some initial reserve, but not nervous or aggressive.

name: Bergamasco (Imp)
temperament: Intelligent, cautious, patient. Good companion/guard.

name: Bernese Mountain Dog
temperament: Self-confident, good-natured, friendly and fearless. Aggressiveness unacceptable.

name: Bichon Frise
temperament: Friendly and outgoing.

name: Black & Tan Coonhound (Imp)
temperament: Even temperament, outgoing and friendly. A working scent hound, able to work in close contact with other hounds and people.

name: Bloodhound
temperament: Affectionate, neither quarrelsome with companions nor with other dogs. Somewhat reserved and sensitive.

name: Bolognese
temperament: Friendly but may be reserved with strangers. Intelligent, companionable.

name: Border Collie
temperament: Keen, alert, responsive and intelligent. Neither nervous nor aggressive.

name: Border Terrier
temperament: Active and game as previously stated.

name: Borzoi
temperament: Sensitive, alert and aloof.

name: Boston Terrier
temperament: Lively, intelligent, determined and strong willed.

name: Bouvier Des Flandres
temperament: Calm and sensible.

name: Boxer
temperament: Equable, biddable, fearless, self-assured.

name: Bracco Italiano
temperament: Hardy and adaptable, gentle and even tempered.

name: Braque D’Auvergne (Imp)
temperament: Gentle, affectionate, intelligent and obedient. Adapts well to family life.

name: Briard
temperament: Fearless, with no trace of timidity or aggressiveness.

name: Brittany
temperament: Gentle and affectionate, yet full of life and exuberance.

name: Bull Terrier
temperament: Of even temperament and amenable to discipline. Although obstinate is particularly good with people.

name: Bull Terrier (Miniature)
temperament: Of even temperament and amenable to discipline. Although obstinate is particularly good with people.

name: Bulldog
temperament: Alert, bold, loyal, dependable, courageous, fierce in appearance, but possessed of affectionate nature.

name: Bullmastiff
temperament: High-spirited, alert and faithful.

name: Cairn Terrier
temperament: Fearless and gay disposition; assertive but not aggressive.

name: Canaan Dog
temperament: Confident and vigilant. Aloof with strangers. Steady and loyal to owners.

name: Canadian Eskimo Dog
temperament: Reflects tough, hard working function. When mature, affectionate, enjoying attention. Pack orientated with extremely rapid response to outside stimulus.

name: Catalan Sheepdog
temperament: Excellent family dog. Alert, loyal and easily trainable. Can initially be wary of strangers.

name: Cavalier King Charles Spaniel
temperament: Gay, friendly, non aggressive; no tendency to nervousness.

name: Cesky Terrier
temperament: Friendly and companionable. Somewhat reserved towards strangers, but neither aggressive nor of a nervous disposition.

name: Chihuahua (Long Coat)
temperament: Gay, spirited and intelligent, neither snappy nor withdrawn.

name: Chihuahua (Smooth Coat)
temperament: Gay, spirited and intelligent, neither snappy nor withdrawn.

name: Chinese Crested
temperament: Happy, never vicious.

name: Chow Chow
temperament: Independent, loyal, yet aloof.

name: Cirneco Dell'Etna
temperament: Strong, lively, independent temperament. Gentle and affectionate.

name: Collie (Rough)
temperament: Friendly disposition with no trace of nervousness or aggressiveness. A great companion dog, friendly, happy and active, good with children and other dogs.

name: Collie (Smooth)
temperament: Friendly disposition with no trace of nervousness or aggressiveness

name: Coton De Tulear
temperament: Loyal, friendly and good natured. Lively, intelligent, adaptable and agile.

name: Dachshund (Long Haired)
temperament: Faithful, versatile and good tempered.

name: Dachshund (Miniature Long Haired)
temperament: Faithful, versatile and good tempered.

name: Dachshund (Miniature Smooth Haired)
temperament: Faithful, versatile and good tempered.

name: Dachshund (Miniature Wire Haired)
temperament: Faithful, versatile and good tempered.

name: Dachshund (Smooth Haired)
temperament: Faithful, versatile and good tempered.

name: Dachshund (Wire Haired)
temperament: Faithful, versatile and good tempered.

name: Dalmatian
temperament: Outgoing and friendly, not shy or hesitant, free from nervousness and aggression.

name: Dandie Dinmont Terrier
temperament: Independent, highly intelligent, determined, persistent, sensitive, affectionate and dignified.

name: Deerhound
temperament: Gentle and friendly. Obedient and easy to train because eager to please. Docile and good-tempered, never suspicious, aggressive or nervous. Carries himself with quiet dignity.

name: Dobermann
temperament: Bold and alert. Shyness or viciousness unacceptable.

name: Dogue de Bordeaux
temperament: Natural guarding instincts, vigilant and courageous without aggression. A good companion and very affectionate.

name: English Setter
temperament: Intensely friendly and good natured.

name: English Toy Terrier (Black & Tan)
temperament: Alert, remembering that historically he could acquit himself satisfactorily in the rat pit. Never unduly nervous.

name: Entlebucher Mountain Dog (Imp)
temperament: Self assured and fearless. Good natured, devoted to family but may be slightly suspicious of strangers.

name: Estrela Mountain Dog
temperament: Loyal, affectionate to owners, aloof to others. Intelligent and alert. Self-willed yet trainable.

name: Eurasier
temperament: Self assured, calm, and of even temperament. Bonds strongly with its family. Reserved with strangers without any signs of aggression.

name: Finnish Lapphund
temperament: Intelligent, brave, calm, faithful. Suitable as companion and watch dog.

name: Finnish Spitz
temperament: Alert, lively, friendly but independent.

name: Fox Terrier (Smooth)
temperament: Friendly, forthcoming and fearless.

name: Fox Terrier (Wire)
temperament: Friendly, forthcoming and fearless.

name: Foxhound
temperament: Friendly and not aggressive.

name: French Bulldog
temperament: Vivacious, deeply affectionate, intelligent.

name: German Longhaired Pointer
temperament: Calm, even tempered. Alert, biddable and very loyal.

name: German Pinscher
temperament: High spirited and self possessed.

name: German Shepherd Dog
temperament: Steady of nerve, loyal, self-assured, courageous and tractable. Never nervous, over-aggressive or shy.

name: German Shorthaired Pointer
temperament: Gentle, affectionate and even-tempered. Alert, biddable and very loyal.

name: German Spitz (Klein)
temperament: Happy, equable disposition, showing confidence, with no sign of nervousness or aggression.

name: German Spitz (Mittel)
temperament: Happy, equable disposition, showing confidence, with no sign of nervousness or aggression.

name: German Wirehaired Pointer
temperament: Gentle, affectionate and even tempered. Alert, biddable and very loyal.

name: Giant Schnauzer
temperament: Bold, reliable, good natured and composed.

name: Glen Of Imaal Terrier
temperament: Game and spirited with great courage when called upon, otherwise gentle and docile.

name: Gordon Setter
temperament: Bold, outgoing, of kindly even disposition.

name: Grand Bleu De Gascogne (Imp)
temperament: Gentle and kind.

name: Great Dane
temperament: Kindly without nervousness, friendly and outgoing.

name: Great Swiss Mountain Dog
temperament: Self-assured, alert and watchful. Even natured. Confident with strangers.

name: Greenland Dog
temperament: Sound, dignified, intelligent, good-natured, affectionate.

name: Greyhound
temperament: Intelligent, gentle, affectionate and even-tempered.

name: Griffon Bruxellois
temperament: Lively and alert.

name: Griffon Fauve De Bretagne (Imp)
temperament: Gentle, sociable, affectionate and friendly.

name: Hamiltonstovare
temperament: Typical even-tempered hound.

name: Harrier
temperament: Friendly, lively. Showing aggression or nervousness unacceptable. Head and Skull Head long with an appearance of quality. Skull fairly broad, of medium width, tapering towards muzzle. Occiput not prominent. Eyebrows pronounced. Slight stop. Clean cheeks. Rectangular muzzle of moderate depth. Flews not excessive. Large nose with broad, open nostrils.

name: Havanese
temperament: Friendly, outgoing.

name: Hovawart
temperament: Kind and even temperament, loyal, self-assured, courageous, tolerant and composed, without nervousness or aggression.

name: Hungarian Kuvasz (Imp)
temperament: Devoted, gentle and patient but suspicious of strangers.

name: Hungarian Mudi (Imp)
temperament: Intelligent, lively, courageous, watchful, and keen to work. Active and adaptable. Aggressive or overly shy behaviour unacceptable.

name: Hungarian Puli
temperament: Lively, wary of strangers, but not displaying nervousness or unprovoked aggression.

name: Hungarian Pumi
temperament: Lively, expressive, bold, a little suspicious of strangers, but never aggressive or overly shy. Somewhat vocal and always ready for action.

name: Hungarian Vizsla
temperament: Lively, gentle mannered and demonstratively affectionate, fearless and with well developed protective instinct.

name: Hungarian Wirehaired Vizsla
temperament: Lively, gentle mannered and demonstrably affectionate.

name: Ibizan Hound
temperament: Reserved with strangers, not nervous or aggressive. Dignified, intelligent and independent.

name: Icelandic Sheepdog (Imp)
temperament: A hardy and agile herding spitz, which barks, making it extremely useful for herding or driving sheep and other livestock. By nature very alert and will announce arrival of visitors without being aggressive. Cheerful, friendly, inquisitive, playful and confident with gentle temperament. Head Strongly built with close fitting skin. Wedge shaped when seen from above or side. Skull somewhat domed. Stop clearly defined though not pronounced. Cheeks clean, well-filled. Muzzle well developed and strong, nasal bridge straight, slightly shorter than skull. Tapering evenly towards nose to form a blunt triangle when seen from both above and side. Lips close fitting. Nose and lips black, dark brown on chocolate brown and some cream dogs.

name: Irish Red & White Setter
temperament: Happy, good natured and affectionate.

name: Irish Setter
temperament: Demonstrably affectionate.

name: Irish Terrier
temperament: Good-tempered, notably with humans, it being admitted, however, that he is perhaps a little too ready to resent interference on the part of other dogs.

name: Irish Wolfhound
temperament: Gentle, kind and friendly nature.

name: Italian Greyhound
temperament: Intelligent, affectionate and vivacious; may appear aloof.

name: Italian Spinone
temperament: Sociable, docile, affectionate and patient.

name: Jack Russell Terrier
temperament: Bold, fearless, friendly and confident.

name: Japanese Akita Inu
temperament: Dignified and composed with a courageous character.

name: Japanese Chin
temperament: Gay, happy, gentle and good natured.

name: Japanese Spitz
temperament: Alert, intelligent, bold and lively.

name: Keeshond
temperament: Confident, alert and friendly. Always ready to raise the alarm.

name: Kerry Blue Terrier
temperament: Disciplined gameness.

name: King Charles Spaniel
temperament: Reserved, gentle and affectionate.

name: Komondor
temperament: Faithful and devoted. This strong, sharp guard dog must be treated with respect.

name: Kooikerhondje
temperament: Lively and agile, self-confident and with sufficient perseverance and stamina, good natured and alert, however not noisy. The breed is faithful, easy-going and friendly to known people, but aloof to strangers..

name: Korean Jindo (Imp)
temperament: Spirited, brave, with strong hunting instinct. Loyal to their owner.

name: Korthals Griffon (Imp)
temperament: Gentle, proud and very loyal, neither timid nor aggressive.

name: Lagotto Romagnolo
temperament: Lively, intelligent, affectionate. An excellent and alert family companion.

name: Lakeland Terrier
temperament: Bold, friendly and self-confident.

name: Lancashire Heeler
temperament: Courageous, happy, affectionate to owner.

name: Large Munsterlander
temperament: Loyal, affectionate and trustworthy.

name: Leonberger
temperament: Self assured and playful. Neither timid nor aggressive.

name: Lhasa Apso
temperament: Alert, steady but somewhat aloof with strangers.

name: Lowchen (Little Lion Dog)
temperament: Intelligent, affectionate showing no sign of aggression.

name: Maltese
temperament: Sweet-tempered.

name: Manchester Terrier
temperament: Discerning and devoted.

name: Maremma Sheepdog
temperament: Lively, any tendency to nervousness or aggression unacceptable.

name: Mastiff
temperament: Calm, affectionate to owners, but capable of guarding. Usually indifferent with strangers; timidity is unacceptable.

name: Miniature Pinscher
temperament: Fearless and alert.

name: Miniature Schnauzer
temperament: Alert, reliable and intelligent. Primarily a companion dog.

name: Neapolitan Mastiff
temperament: Steady, loyal, devoted and vigilant. Slightly aloof.

name: Newfoundland
temperament: Exceptionally gentle, docile nature.

name: Norfolk Terrier
temperament: Alert and fearless.

name: Norwegian Buhund
temperament: Fearless, brave and energetic.

name: Norwegian Elkhound
temperament: Friendly, intelligent and independent without any sign of nervousness.

name: Norwich Terrier
temperament: Gay and fearless.

name: Old English Sheepdog
temperament: A biddable dog of even disposition. Bold, faithful and trustworthy, with no suggestion of nervousness or unprovoked aggression.

name: Otterhound
temperament: Amiable and even tempered. Signs of aggression or nervousness unacceptable.

name: Papillon
temperament: Lively, intelligent, friendly, with no aggression; always alert.

name: Parson Russell Terrier
temperament: Bold and friendly.

name: Pekingese
temperament: Fearless, loyal, aloof, not timid or aggressive.

name: Pharaoh Hound
temperament: Alert, intelligent, friendly, affectionate and playful.

name: Picardy Sheepdog (Imp)
temperament: Even tempered, neither aggressive, shy nor nervous. Obedient, fearless, a natural herder and good guard for home and family.

name: Pointer
temperament: Kind, even disposition.

name: Polish Lowland Sheepdog
temperament: Alert, equable.

name: Pomeranian
temperament: Extrovert, lively and intelligent.

name: Poodle (Miniature)
temperament: Gay-spirited and good-tempered.

name: Poodle (Standard)
temperament: Gay-spirited and good-tempered.

name: Poodle (Toy)
temperament: Gay spirited and good tempered.

name: Portuguese Podengo
temperament: Sociable, intelligent and lively.

name: Portuguese Pointer (Imp)
temperament: Kind, affectionate, calm and very sociable.

name: Portuguese Water Dog
temperament: Pleasant disposition, self-willed but very obedient to owner. Brave and tireless.

name: Pug
temperament: Even tempered, happy and lively disposition.

name: Pyrenean Mastiff (Imp)
temperament: Friendly towards people, calm, noble and intelligent. Courageous and confident towards strangers, never backing away. Good-natured towards other animals, and aware of his great size. Can and will guard and protect only when necessary.

name: Pyrenean Mountain Dog
temperament: Quietly confident. Nervousness and unprovoked aggression highly undesirable.

name: Pyrenean Sheepdog (Long Haired)
temperament: Alert, lively, mischievous and inquiring, but may be wary of strangers. Neither nervous nor aggressive.

name: Pyrenean Sheepdog (Smooth Faced) (Imp)
temperament: Alert, lively, mischievous & enquiring. May be wary of strangers, but never nervous or aggressive. Biddable. Head and Skull Triangular when viewed from above, with muzzle tapering evenly to nose. Skull length equal to width at its widest point, flat with slight central furrow, occiput slightly pronounced. Muzzle slightly shorter than skull. The sides of skull slightly rounded. Foreface and skull almost parallel with minimal stop.

name: Retriever (Chesapeake Bay)
temperament: Bright and happy disposition, alert and intelligent and showing a willingness to work.

name: Retriever (Curly Coated)
temperament: Bold, friendly self confident and independent. May seem aloof.

name: Retriever (Flat Coated)
temperament: Confident and kindly.

name: Retriever (Golden)
temperament: Kindly, friendly and confident.

name: Retriever (Labrador)
temperament: Intelligent, keen and biddable, with a strong will to please. Kindly nature, with no trace of aggression or undue shyness.

name: Retriever (Nova Scotia Duck Tolling)
temperament: Kind, confident, intelligent, easy to train. Playful.

name: Rhodesian Ridgeback
temperament: Dignified, intelligent, aloof with strangers but showing no aggression or shyness.

name: Rottweiler
temperament: Good natured, not nervous, aggressive or vicious; courageous, biddable, with natural guarding instincts.

name: Russian Black Terrier
temperament: Alert, lively and even-tempered, wary of strangers. Resilient, brave and self-confident.

name: Russian Toy
temperament: Active, lively, neither timid nor aggressive

name: Saluki
temperament: Reserved with strangers but not nervous or aggressive. Dignified, intelligent and independent.

name: Samoyed
temperament: Displays affection to all mankind. Unprovoked nervousness or aggression highly undesirable.

name: Schipperke
temperament: Amenable, intelligent and faithful.

name: Schnauzer
temperament: Alert, reliable and intelligent. Primarily a companion dog.

name: Scottish Terrier
temperament: Bold, but never aggressive.

name: Sealyham Terrier
temperament: Alert and fearless but of friendly disposition.

name: Shar Pei
temperament: Calm, independent, very affectionate, and devoted to people.

name: Shetland Sheepdog
temperament: Affectionate and responsive to his owner, reserved towards strangers, never nervous.

name: Shih Tzu
temperament: Friendly and independent.

name: Siberian Husky
temperament: Friendly and gentle, alert and outgoing. Does not display traits of the guard dog, not suspicious with strangers or aggressive with dogs but some measure of reserve expected in mature dog. Intelligent, tractable and eager disposition. An agreeable companion and willing worker.

name: Skye Terrier
temperament: A ‘one-man’ dog, distrustful of strangers, never vicious.

name: Sloughi
temperament: Reserved, aloof with strangers. Neither nervous nor aggressive. Affectionate with family.

name: Soft Coated Wheaten Terrier
temperament: Good tempered, spirited and game. Full of confidence and humour; a delightful, affectionate, intelligent companion.

name: Spaniel (American Cocker)
temperament: Equable with no suggestion of timidity. Head and Skull Well developed and rounded, neither flat nor domed. Eyebrows and stop clearly defined. Median line distinctly marked to rather more than half-way up crown. Area surrounding eye socket well chiselled. Distance from tip of nose to stop approximately one-half distance from stop up over crown to base of skull. Muzzle broad, deep, square, even jaws. Nose well developed. Nostrils black in black and tans, black or brown in buffs, browns, brown and tans, roans and parti-colours.

name: Spaniel (Clumber)
temperament: Steady, reliable, kind and dignified; more aloof than other Spaniels. Any tendency towards aggression unacceptable.

name: Spaniel (Cocker)
temperament: Gentle and affectionate, yet full of life and exuberance.

name: Spaniel (English Springer)
temperament: Friendly, happy disposition, biddable. Timidity or aggression unacceptable.

name: Spaniel (Field)
temperament: Unusually docile, active, sensitive, independent.

name: Spaniel (Irish Water)
temperament: Initially aloof, staunch and affectionate; with an endearing sense of humour and a stable disposition.

name: Spaniel (Sussex)
temperament: Kindly disposition, aggression unacceptable .

name: Spaniel (Welsh Springer)
temperament: Kindly disposition. Never nervous. Showing aggression unacceptable.

name: Spanish Water Dog
temperament: Faithful, obedient, brave, good tempered and gay.

name: St. Bernard
temperament: Steady, kindly, intelligent, courageous, trustworthy and benevolent.

name: Staffordshire Bull Terrier
temperament: Bold, fearless and totally reliable.

name: Swedish Lapphund (Imp)
temperament: Kind, friendly, devoted, lively and alert.

name: Swedish Vallhund
temperament: Friendly, active, eager to please. Head and Skull Rather long and a clean-cut, blunt wedge with almost flat skull and well-defined stop. Viewed from above, shows an even wedge shape from skull to tip of nose. Muzzle, viewed from side, looks rather square, slightly shorter than skull. Lower jaw strong. Although a dark mask is acceptable, a well-defined mask is highly desirable with lighter hair around eyes, on muzzle and under the throat, giving a distinct contrast to the upper mask. Tightly closed lips. Nose black.

name: Tibetan Mastiff
temperament: Independently minded, aloof and protective. Calm and patient. May be wary of strangers.

name: Tibetan Spaniel
temperament: Alert, loyal but independent.

name: Tibetan Terrier
temperament: Outgoing, alert, intelligent and game; neither fierce nor pugnacious. Sparing of affection to strangers.

name: Turkish Kangal Dog
temperament: This is not by nature an aggressive breed but it can be dominant and territorial. Steady and bold, naturally independent, very intelligent. Proud and confident, but can be aloof with strangers. Loyal to its master.

name: Weimaraner
temperament: Fearless, friendly, protective, obedient and alert.

name: Welsh Corgi (Cardigan)
temperament: Alert, intelligent, steady, not shy or aggressive.

name: Welsh Corgi (Pembroke)
temperament: Outgoing and friendly, never nervous or aggressive.

name: Welsh Terrier
temperament: Happy and volatile, rarely of shy nature. Game and fearless but definitely not aggressive although at all times able to hold his own when necessary.

name: West Highland White Terrier
temperament: Alert, gay, courageous, self reliant but friendly.

name: Whippet
temperament: Gentle, affectionate, even disposition.

name: White Swiss Shepherd Dog (Imp)
temperament: Lively and friendly temperament, never shy or aggressive. Can be reserved. Easily trained.

name: Xoloitzcuintle (Mex Hairless) Int (Imp)
temperament: Cheerful, alert and intelligent. Can be aloof and wary with strangers. Good watchdog and excellent companion. Never aggressive.

name: Xoloitzcuintle (Mex Hairless) Min (Imp)
temperament: Cheerful, alert and intelligent. Can be aloof and wary with strangers. Good watchdog and excellent companion. Never aggressive.

name: Xoloitzcuintle (Mex Hairless) Std (Imp)
temperament: Cheerful, alert and intelligent. Can be aloof and wary with strangers. Good watchdog and excellent companion. Never aggressive.

name: Yorkshire Terrier
temperament: Spirited with even disposition.
